title: Skyblock Schematia
description: A hypixel skyblock modpack for 1.21 customizable with supported resourcepacks
body:
# Skyblock Schematia
Skyblock Schematia modpack (formerly Lito's Skyblock Package) is a hypixel modpack made for 1.21+ to allow customization of Hypixel Skyblock's features and items. 


## Disclaimer
- 1.8.9 resourcepacks are not supported
- You have to provide your own custom item textures pack made for 1.21
- Not affiliated or endorsed with or by Hypixel

# Kinect Hosting (Ad)
